title: Forge project profile (profile-project.json)
description: Deterministic stack facts emitted by bootstrap/profile-project.mjs into <project>/.claude/profile-project.json. Pure facts, no composition decisions. The composer reads these against manifests/ to pick a profile and modules. See docs/BOOTSTRAP.md §Profile.

hasTests.description: True when a test runner / test files are detected. Consumed by manifests/profiles.json moduleSelectionRules (facts.hasTests == true -> add the eval module).

intended.description: Spec-aware HINT: the intended stack inferred from prose in the detected doc/spec dirs + root doc files (README/docs/AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md). ALWAYS emitted (like hasTests). Kept STRICTLY separate from the materialized languages/frameworks/database facts and never merged into them — it lets the composer nudge toward the right profile for a spec-first project whose code does not yet exist. Empty arrays / null when nothing is found. Consumed by manifests/profiles.json moduleSelectionRules (facts.intended.*).

languages.description: Languages mentioned in spec/doc prose, e.g. ["python", "typescript"].

frameworks.description: Frameworks/libraries mentioned in spec/doc prose, e.g. ["fastapi", "pydantic", "next"].

database.description: Database mentioned in spec/doc prose, e.g. "postgres"; null when none found.

_meta.description: Provenance/evidence emitted by the profiler (underscore-prefixed, non-spec). Free-form; the composer ignores it for decisions.

database.description: Detected primary database, e.g. "postgres"; null/absent when none detected.

monorepo.description: True when workspace/monorepo signals are present (pnpm-workspace.yaml, turbo.json, apps/+packages/, multiple package.json).

ci.description: Detected CI system(s), e.g. ["github-actions"]; empty array / null when none detected.

commands.description: The real invocations to wire into hooks, keyed by purpose, e.g. { "test": "uv run pytest", "typecheck": "uv run mypy .", "lint": "uv run ruff check .", "fe_test": "pnpm test", "fe_typecheck": "pnpm -s tsc --noEmit" }.

docs.description: Existing documentation Forge should extend rather than overwrite.

constitution.description: Path to an existing constitution (AGENTS.md / CLAUDE.md) if one exists.
